metric_title: Flood area overlap share
source_name: Environment Agency Flood Monitoring API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: This is a contextual overlap measure based on Environment Agency flood-area polygons. It should not be read as a prediction of flooding or realised flood events.

metric_title: Average annual daily motor traffic
source_name: Department for Transport Road Traffic Statistics API
source_geography: Traffic count points summarised to neighbourhood
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: This is a sampled traffic-flow context measure based on DfT count points and link lengths. It should not be read as total traffic on every street in the neighbourhood.

metric_title: Bus access node count
source_name: NaPTAN / NPTG API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Bus access nodes capture stop infrastructure within the neighbourhood boundary, not service frequency or reliability.

metric_title: Cycle dock capacity
source_name: TfL Unified API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Dock capacity sums the total number of docking spaces at cycle-hire stations within the neighbourhood. It is a specific cycle-access context measure, not a full transport-capacity metric.

metric_title: Cycle dock capacity density
source_name: TfL Unified API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Dock-capacity density gives a more comparable view of cycle-hire infrastructure than raw totals, but it is still only one part of local transport access.

metric_title: Cycle docking station count
source_name: TfL Unified API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Cycle docking station counts show cycle-hire infrastructure within the neighbourhood boundary. They are a bounded transport-access context measure, not a full public transport accessibility score.

metric_title: Cycle docking station density
source_name: TfL Unified API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Density is more comparable than a raw count, but it still reflects the limited geography of the cycle-hire network rather than overall transport accessibility.

metric_title: Public transport access node count
source_name: NaPTAN / NPTG API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Counts transport access nodes within neighbourhood boundaries. This is an infrastructure proxy, not a full public transport accessibility score.

metric_title: Public transport access node density
source_name: NaPTAN / NPTG API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Density is based on access nodes per square kilometre. It is more comparable than a raw count, but it still represents transport infrastructure proxy rather than full access quality.

metric_title: Rail and tube access node count
source_name: NaPTAN / NPTG API
geography_version: current custom neighbourhoods
caveats: Rail and tube access nodes capture station infrastructure within the neighbourhood boundary, not service frequency, connectivity, or capacity.
